query: UPDATE project_cash_flow_settings SET funding_source = 'escrow' WHERE item_key IN ('developer_fee_offplan','fraz_fee','rera_registration','rera_units','noc_fee','escrow_fee','community_fee','marketing_offplan','escrow_deposit') AND scenario = 'offplan_escrow';
